questions.question: What's the biggest reason you're considering the nomad lifestyle?
options: I want to freely travel across multiple countries
I want to stay in one place and experience it deeply
I want to reduce living costs and improve quality of life
I want to escape my current environment and rest

questions.question: What's your ideal length of stay?
options: Move frequently, 1-2 months per city
Settle in one city for 3-6 months
Stay deeply for 6+ months
Cost matters more than duration

questions.question: What's the most important factor for you?
options: Visa flexibility and ease of travel
Local community and cultural access
Monthly cost of living reduction
Natural environment and slow pace of life

questions.question: Where do you focus best when working?
options: At cafes or coworking spaces with others
Alone in a quiet accommodation
Anywhere cost-effective
Somewhere with a view of nature

questions.question: What worries you most about nomad life?
options: Managing visa periods and stay calculations
Loneliness and lack of community
Budget overruns and cost management
Health and mental stability

questions.question: Do you have plans to stay in Europe?
options: Yes, I'm planning a Schengen 90-day route
I want to settle long-term in Europe
I prefer Southeast Asia or Latin America over Europe
No specific plans yet

questions.question: What does your ideal life look like in 5 years?
options: Freely moving between bases in multiple countries
Obtaining permanent residency in a city I love
Achieving financial freedom and living wherever I want
Maintaining a healthy lifestyle without burnout

wanderer.label: Schengen Looper
wanderer.description: A route-optimizing nomad who freely roams across Europe

local.label: Base Settler
local.description: A long-term nomad who deeply immerses in one city

planner.label: Cost Optimizer
planner.description: A nomad designing high quality of life at low cost

free_spirit.label: Burnout Escapee
free_spirit.description: A nomad seeking recovery through nature and slow pace

pioneer.label: Freedom Seeker
pioneer.description: A nomad designing a new life through permanent residency
traits: Building a base outside home country

stepTitles: What kind of stay are you thinking about?
